info.title: Rapidata Workflow API
info.description: The API for the Rapidata Workflow service

get.summary: Gets the results for an evaluation workflow.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow to get the results for.

parameters.name: states
parameters.description: Optional list of rapid states to filter by. If not provided, all states are included.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

get.summary: Gets the result overview for a grouped ranking workflow.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow to get the results for.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Filter by id.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by name.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by state.

parameters.name: logic
parameters.description: How to combine the field filters: "and" (default) requires every filter to match, "or" requires any of them to match.

get.summary: Gets the result overview for a ranking workflow.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow to get the results for.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

get.summary: Gets the result overview for a simple workflow.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow to get the results for.

parameters.name: states
parameters.description: Optional list of rapid states to include in the results.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

delete.summary: Deletes a workflow by its id.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow to delete.

get.summary: Returns the workflow identified by workflowId.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: Identifier of the workflow to fetch.

get.summary: Returns the number of times each asset index won across the workflow's rapids.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow to get the summary for.

parameters.name: useUserScore
parameters.description: Whether to use the user score to determine the winner.

get.summary: Gets the progress of a workflow.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow to get the progress for.

get.summary: Gets the most recent or oldest responses for a workflow, across any rapid.

parameters.name: workflowId
parameters.description: The ID of the workflow to get the responses for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of responses to return.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Whether the oldest or most recent responses should be returned.

get.summary: Queries workflows based on the provided filter, page, and sort criteria.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: The 1-based page index.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: The number of items per page.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort fields. Prefix with - for descending order (e.g. -created_at).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Filter by id.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter by name.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Filter by state.

parameters.name: owner_mail
parameters.description: Filter by owner_mail.

parameters.name: logic
parameters.description: How to combine the field filters: "and" (default) requires every filter to match, "or" requires any of them to match.

winCounter.description: The number of times each asset index was the winner.

allTargetGroupsCompleted.description: Whether all target groups for this workflow are completed.

pairMakerInformation.description: Information about the pair-maker used by the sub-workflow.

total.description: The total number of items in the result.

totalVotes.description: The total number of votes across all datapoints.

items.description: The datapoints on the current page.

responses.description: The (possibly capped) list of responses for the rapid.

totalResponseCount.description:
The true number of matching responses for this rapid, regardless of whether the
 returned Responses list was capped.

context.description: The optional textual context of the rapid.

contextAsset.description: The optional asset shown as context to the user.

aggregation.description:
Per-payload-type aggregation over all matching responses (computed before sampling).
 Populated for Compare and Classify rapids; null otherwise.

completionPercentage.description: The percentage of workflow datapoints that have been completed.

total.description: The total number of datapoints in the workflow.

completed.description: The number of datapoints that have been completed.

state.description: The current state of the workflow.

responses.description: The (possibly capped) list of responses for the rapid.

totalResponseCount.description:
The true number of matching responses for this rapid, regardless of whether the
 returned Responses list was capped.

context.description: The optional textual context of the rapid.

contextAsset.description: The optional asset shown as context to the user.

aggregation.description:
Per-payload-type aggregation over all matching responses (computed before sampling).
 Populated for Compare and Classify rapids; null otherwise.
